brand.subtitle: Controlled consolidation, source authority, and publish readiness
brand.logoPolicy: Use text wordmark until a reviewed logo asset is confirmed. Do not invent or embed a logo image without an approved asset reference.
brandNotes: Use consistent CL/gate/status badges across all documents and route shells.
Prefer source authority and review state over decorative graphics.
Keep claim-sensitive surfaces visibly locked until reviewed.

landingGraphs.title: Package status
landingGraphs.purpose: Show current package families and whether they are complete, active, pending, or blocked.

landingGraphs.title: Route readiness
landingGraphs.purpose: Show LightSpeed / CYC routes, deploy state, claim gate, and next action.

landingGraphs.title: Achilles node globe
landingGraphs.purpose: Show Achilles, LightSpeed, W1-W6, D1-D6, Raphael, CCC, SHFF, M1, digital twin suite, and governance gates.

landingGraphs.title: Blocker matrix
landingGraphs.purpose: Show current blockers: Drive moves, spreadsheet mutation, transfer readiness, public deployment, checksum selection.

landingGraphs.title: Transfer batches
landingGraphs.purpose: Show T1-T5 transfer batches and readiness gates before achilles.romer handoff.

routes.title: Raphael Engine Panels
routes.claimGate: simulation only / proof required / no validation claim

documentTemplates.logPolicy: Retain consolidated logs at the back of workbooks and in final package documents. Do not delete version history until extraction and approval.

blockedActions: destructive Drive update without owner approval
